title: stelis clausa
intro: Stelis clausa, also known as the 'Closed Lip Orchid', is a species of orchid native to Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stelis clausa include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
